predicates.name: has_legal_personality
predicates.description: The company has legal personality (a background/prerequisite status directly assertable from case facts).

predicates.name: is_starting_company
predicates.description: The company is starting its business (first financial year).

predicates.name: is_first_financial_year
predicates.description: The financial year is the first financial year of the company.

predicates.name: employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The employee criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year (annual average employees > 50).

predicates.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The turnover criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year (annual net turnover excl. VAT > 11,250,000 EUR).

predicates.name: balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The balance sheet criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year (balance sheet total > 6,000,000 EUR).

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: More than one small-company criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year.

predicates.name: not_more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: Not more than one small-company criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year.

predicates.name: estimated_employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The estimated employee criterion is exceeded for a starting company in the first financial year based on good-faith estimate.

predicates.name: estimated_turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The estimated turnover criterion is exceeded for a starting company in the first financial year based on good-faith estimate.

predicates.name: estimated_balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The estimated balance sheet criterion is exceeded for a starting company in the first financial year based on good-faith estimate.

predicates.name: more_than_one_estimated_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: More than one estimated small-company criterion is exceeded for a starting company in the first financial year.

predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a small company in the relevant financial year.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover excluding VAT of the company in the financial year, in euros.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the financial year, in euros.

functions.name: estimated_annual_average_employees
functions.description: The good-faith estimate at the beginning of the first financial year of the annual average number of employees.

functions.name: estimated_annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The good-faith estimate at the beginning of the first financial year of the annual net turnover excluding VAT, in euros.

functions.name: estimated_balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The good-faith estimate at the beginning of the first financial year of the balance sheet total, in euros.

functions.name: last_closed_financial_year
functions.description: The last closed financial year for the company relative to the given reference financial year.
